title: INSERT INTO ... EXCEPT ... fails
poc: create table tmp_a (node integer, k varchar(255), v varchar(1024));
create table tmp_b (node integer, k varchar(255), v varchar(1024));
insert into tmp_a select node,k,v from tmp_b except select node,k,v from tmp_a;
select node,k,v from tmp_a except select node,k,v from tmp_b;
select node,k,v from tmp_b except select node,k,v from tmp_a;
SELECT node,k,v FROM new_node_tags EXCEPT SELECT node,k,v FROM node_tags;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO with EXCEPT clause fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp_c (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE TABLE tmp_d (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO tmp_c SELECT id, name, value FROM tmp_d EXCEPT SELECT id, name, value FROM tmp_c;
